headline: 暑期档预热：新片《痴迷》领跑热搜
headlineEn: Summer Season Heats Up: 'Obsession' Tops Trending
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》与《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续霸榜。本周新片仅1部，下周《安昂传奇》等备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' dominate trending. Only 1 new movie this week; 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' highly anticipated next week.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《达顿牧场》衍生剧热度不减，本周仍在前五。
industryHighlights.en: 'Dutton Ranch' spinoff remains hot, still in top 5 this week.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》立项引怀旧潮。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' announcement sparks nostalgia.

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》与《玩具总动员5》并列本周期待榜。
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' and 'Toy Story 5' tie on this week's most-anticipated list.
